## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Superhuman to discuss ongoing projects and updates.](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Looker dashboards need refinement; Elvis finds some pages lack value for customers](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Communication about pausing services needed for Superhuman and Exec](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Superhuman team is busy with their "Summer of AI" initiative](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Meeting with Superhuman team needs rescheduling due to their travel](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)

## Topics

### Looker Dashboard Review

  - [Elvis reviewed the dashboards but found issues:](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
      - [Many pages lack customer value despite looking nice](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
      - [Expressed desire to be involved in dashboard creation process](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Mara acknowledged it's version 1 (B1) with room for customization](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Agreed to have a separate chat to discuss dashboard improvements](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)

### Client Communication

  - [Elvis wasn't aware he needed to communicate about service pauses](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Will inform Superhuman and Exec about the pause](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Mara offered support, emphasizing it's a reminder to mention when opportunity arises](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Pause doesn't apply to Smith.AI](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

### Superhuman Team Update

  - [Superhuman team described as "always pretty busy"](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Recently launched "Summer of AI" initiative (mentioned in their newsletter)](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Joe and Eticham helping Elvis catch up this week and possibly next](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)

### Meeting Rescheduling

  - [Alex messaged about not attending due to morning flight](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Team will attempt to reschedule, possibly for tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [If rescheduling fails, async communication about audit week will be sent](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)

### Personal Updates

  - [Mara is moving to Brooklyn Heights, her favorite neighborhood](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Elvis shared experiences of visiting NYC, mentioning tourist spots like the Night at the Museum location and Monk's from Seinfeld](https://fathom.video/share/jAxZUn7MyeinEzikj1A6mhm_-YUtsUux?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

## Next Steps
